history.note: Fix: Load Flow now accepts ZIP, bare .json, bare .js, or .json+.js picked together in one dialog (multiple attribute)
Feature: Save Flow / Load Flow handle machine+services as a paired ZIP; bare .json load still supported for machine-only swaps
Fix: right pane width 450px→380px, profile viewer padding tightened — layout fits at 100% zoom without browser scaling; Send button added alongside text input fields
Fix: deep copy config before mutation in start() so restart/replay regenerate actions correctly
Fix: pre-generate assign closures to work around XState 5 params limitation in .provide()
Diagnostics: raw action log in updateContext, version+URL at boot
Fix: combine updateContext actions on email SUBMIT; add diagnostics for rate/email context
Fix: user bubble ordering — appears before bot response in all paths
Fix: diagram array transitions, validation bubble, replay guard check
Phase 1: validation moved to XState-native guards in flow layer
